pricing_tier.quote_span: Fees are set forth in the applicable Order Form and are not tiered; a single flat monthly fee applies regardless of transaction volume.

renewal_term.quote_span: This Agreement shall terminate automatically at the end of that six-month term and shall not renew, whether automatically or otherwise. Continued services after the term requires a new, separately negotiated agreement.
renewal_term.annotation_note: Explicit non-renewal case. The word 'automatically' appears in the same sentence as 'terminate', not 'renew' — a known trap for keyword-matching extractors that key on 'automatically renew' without reading what automatically modifies.
